svg.font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', system-ui, sans-serif

svg:
클래스 다이어그램 — AI 감정분석 음악추천 시스템
Client
Backend
ML Server
DB
도메인 엔티티
VoiceCapture + record(): AudioBlob + stop(): AudioBlob + send(audio: AudioBlob): void - maxDuration: int - mediaRecorder: MediaRecorder
RecommendationVisualizer + renderChart(emotions: EmotionVector[], tracks: Music[]): void + renderList(recs: Recommendation[]): void
«interface» STTService + transcribe(audio: AudioBlob): string
WhisperLocalAdapter + transcribe(audio: AudioBlob): string - modelPath: string
WhisperApiAdapter + transcribe(audio: AudioBlob): string - apiKey: string - endpoint: string
ContextAnalyzer + analyze(text: string): ContextRepresentation - llmClient: GeminiClient
EmotionFusion + fuse(emotion: EmotionVector, ctx: ContextRepresentation) : FusedQuery
RecommendationEngine + recommend(query: FusedQuery): Recommendation[] - computeSimilarity(q, m): float - catalog: MusicCatalog
FeedbackLogger + log(event: FeedbackEvent): void + aggregate(userId: string): Profile - db: PostgreSQLClient
CatalogSynchronizer + syncFromYouTube( seedPlaylistId: string): void - youtubeClient, spotifyClient
EmotionClassifier + predict(audio: AudioBlob): EmotionVector - model: wav2vec2Model // ADR-0002: wav2vec2 fine-tuning
MusicCatalog + search(features: AudioFeatures): Music[] + insert(track: Music): void - db: PostgreSQLClient
User + id: string + email: string + passwordHash: string + createdAt: datetime
Profile + userId: string + preferredGenres: string[] + feedbackHistory: Feedback[] + preferences: dict
EmotionVector + valence: float + energy: float + arousal: float + dominance: float
ContextRepresentation + keywords: string[] + situation: string + mood: string + rawText: string
FusedQuery + emotion: EmotionVector + context: ContextRepresentation
Music + id: string + title: string + artist: string + albumArt: string + audioFeatures: AudioFeatures
Recommendation + music: Music + score: float + reason: string + createdAt: datetime
Feedback + userId: string + musicId: string + type: 'like'|'dislike'|'play' + timestamp: datetime
FeedbackEvent + type: string + musicId: string + playbackSeconds?: int
AudioFeatures + valence: float + energy: float + danceability: float + tempo: float
